rows.description: Computus Dni Rectoris a 2do Die Novm 1814
rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash's transcription, which accurately reflects the first header line. Claude-haiku merged this line with the next and heavily misread the text. (Visual Override)
Selected gemini-flash's transcription for this distinct header line. Claude-haiku incorrectly merged this text into its first row. (Added missing row)
Selected gemini-flash's `row_type` and `description` as it is a more accurate visual transcription and classification as a header. (Visual Override)

Selected gemini-flash's `row_type` (header) for correct classification. Corrected `description` to 'Money Rents fixed' based on visual inspection, aligning with claude-haiku's reading for 'Rents' and removing gemini-flash's erroneous final dot. (Visual Override)

Selected gemini-flash's entry entirely. Claude-haiku significantly misread the description and incorrectly parsed the single pound amount (135) into pounds, shillings, and a half-penny fraction. (Visual Override)
Selected gemini-flash's entry entirely. Claude-haiku significantly misread the description and incorrectly parsed the single pound amount (136) into only shillings. (Visual Override)
Selected gemini-flash's entry, which accurately extracts this distinct row with its shilling amount. Claude-haiku missed this row. (Added missing row)

Selected gemini-flash's entry, which accurately extracts this distinct row with no amount. Claude-haiku missed this row and presented an invented/misread row 'Late Lot Baruh' instead, which was dropped. (Added missing row, Dropped extra row)
Selected gemini-flash's entry. Claude-haiku heavily misread this header and incorrectly merged it with subsequent rows. (Visual Override)
Selected gemini-flash's entry. Claude-haiku missed this distinct entry, having merged its text into a prior header. The dash in the pence column clearly indicates zero pence. (Added missing row)
Selected gemini-flash's entry. Claude-haiku missed this distinct entry, having merged its text into a prior header. (Added missing row)
Selected gemini-flash's entry. Claude-haiku missed this distinct entry, having merged its text into a prior header. (Added missing row)
Selected gemini-flash's `row_type` and `description`, which matches the visual text. Claude-haiku had 'Variables' for the description and classified it as 'entry'. (Visual Override)

Selected gemini-flash's entry entirely. Claude-haiku merged this description with the next line's text and correctly identified pounds and shillings but missed inferring zero pence from the dash. (Visual Override)

Selected gemini-flash's amounts, as they are accurately read. Corrected description to 'Middleton Stills Do / 2 Years' based on visual inspection for completeness. Claude-haiku correctly read the amounts but completely misread the description. (Visual Override)
Selected gemini-flash's entry entirely. Claude-haiku misread the description and pence value. (Visual Override)
Selected gemini-flash's entry entirely. Claude-haiku misread the description and did not infer zero pence. (Visual Override)

Amounts selected by consensus as both extractors correctly read 8.0.1 (interpreting the dash as zero shillings). Selected gemini-flash's description as it is visually accurate. (Consensus, Visual Override)
Selected gemini-flash's entry entirely. Claude-haiku misread the description and the pound amount (44 instead of 4). (Visual Override)
Selected gemini-flash's entry, which accurately extracts this distinct header. Claude-haiku missed this row. (Added missing row)
Selected gemini-flash's entry entirely. Claude-haiku misread the description and the pence value. (Visual Override)

Selected gemini-flash's entry, which accurately extracts this distinct row. Claude-haiku completely misread this entry and seemed to replace it with an unrelated/invented row 'Aldons & d' 18.10.6, which was dropped. (Added missing row, Dropped extra row)
Selected gemini-flash's entry entirely. Claude-haiku misread the description and the shillings amount. (Visual Override)
Selected gemini-flash's entry entirely. Claude-haiku misread the description and all monetary amounts. (Visual Override)

Amounts selected by consensus with claude-haiku. Selected gemini-flash's description for accuracy and its specific note regarding the '2' vs '3' pound digit, indicating careful visual verification. (Consensus, Note Assessment)

Selected gemini-flash's description, pounds, and pence. Both extractors correctly identified the shillings and fraction. Claude-haiku misread the description, pounds, and pence values. (Visual Override)
Selected gemini-flash's entry. Claude-haiku heavily misread this header line. (Visual Override)

Selected gemini-flash's entry entirely, including the correct interpretation of 0 pounds. Claude-haiku misread the amounts significantly (pounds, shillings, pence) and the description. (Visual Override)

Selected gemini-flash's entry entirely, including the correct interpretation of 0 pounds and 0 pence from the dash. Claude-haiku misread the amounts significantly (pounds, shillings) and the description. (Visual Override)
Selected gemini-flash's entry, which correctly infers zero pence from the dash. Claude-haiku did not infer pence. (Visual Override)
Selected gemini-flash's entry, which accurately extracts this distinct row with amounts. Claude-haiku missed this row. (Added missing row)
Selected gemini-flash's entry entirely, including accurate description and all monetary amounts. Claude-haiku misread the description, pounds, and pence values. (Visual Override)
Selected gemini-flash's entry entirely. Claude-haiku incorrectly merged this header with the next line's description. (Visual Override)
Selected gemini-flash's entry entirely. Claude-haiku misread the description and the shillings amount. (Visual Override)

Amounts and row_type selected by consensus with claude-haiku. Selected gemini-flash's empty description as it accurately reflects the absence of text on the page for this final total line. (Consensus, Visual Override)
